task_completion.description: Open the draft Official Statement document in a word processor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) is open displaying the document 'os_draft_greenfield.docx' with the title 'City of Greenfield' and 'Series 2024A'.

task_completion.description: Correct the par amount total in the financial table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The financial table in the document is visible, and the total par amount at the bottom of the table has been changed from $43,500,000 to $45,000,000.

task_completion.description: Correct the S&P rating in the document text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ratings section of the document is visible, showing the S&P rating corrected to 'AA' (the minus sign from 'AA-' is removed), while the Moody's rating remains 'Aa2'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the final maturity date and coupon rate are correct.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The maturity table or bond terms section is visible, showing a final maturity date of October 1, 2044 (or 10/01/2044) and a coupon rate of 5.00%.

task_completion.description: Save the corrected document to the original path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word processor shows the file is saved (e.g., no unsaved changes asterisk/indicator on the save icon or title bar), or a save dialog/notification confirms it is saved to /home/ga/Documents/os_draft_greenfield.docx.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor to edit the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with LibreOffice Writer or a similar GUI application, not just running terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands like sed, awk, or python scripts to bypass manual editing.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands that directly manipulate the text content of the .docx file.

integrity.description: The edits were made in the proper context of the document structure.
integrity.visual_evidence: The corrected values ($45,000,000 and 'AA') are placed correctly within the existing tables and paragraphs, not just appended to the end of the document or typed randomly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document is a draft Official Statement for the City of Greenfield's Series 2024A General Obligation Bonds. The correct total par amount is $45,000,000 (the agent must fix the intentionally flawed $43,500,000 in the table). The S&P rating must be corrected from 'AA-' to 'AA', while Moody's rating should remain 'Aa2'. The final maturity date is October 1, 2044, with a 5.00% coupon rate. The file must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/os_draft_greenfield.docx.
